title: Credit Analyst
description: Reviews financial records to evaluate credit risk for businesses or individuals. Highly routine analytical tasks are increasingly handled by automated scoring systems.
description_zh: 评估个人或企业信用风险，审核财务记录。由于信用评估分析任务高度程序化，正逐渐被自动评分系统和决策模型取代。
sources: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Financial Analysts
OECD: Automation Risk in Financial Services

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in HTS Tariff Classification, Import/Export Regulations to transition into the Customs Broker role.

title: Wealth Manager
description: Advises clients on investments, tax planning, and asset allocation. Requires high human empathy and relationship building, augmented by AI portfolio optimization.
description_zh: 为客户提供投资、税务规划和资产配置建议。需要极高的人际共情和信任建立，同时使用AI进行组合优化。
sources: World Economic Forum: Future of Jobs Report

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in IoT Sensor Diagnostics, Mechanical Troubleshooting to transition into the Predictive Maintenance Technician role.
Develop proficiency in Patient Communication, Differential Diagnosis to transition into the General Practitioner MD role.
Develop proficiency in Patient Relation Management, Telehealth Platform Operations to transition into the AI Healthcare Care Coordinator role.

title: Risk Management Specialist
description: Identifies and analyzes operational, financial, or reputational risks. Role evolves from manual spreadsheet audit to designing and auditing complex risk simulation systems.
description_zh: 识别并分析运营、财务或声誉风险。工作重点正从传统报表审计，转向设计和审计复杂的风险模拟与机器学习预测系统。
sources: GARP (Global Association of Risk Professionals) Survey

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Regulatory Mapping, Compliance Software Auditing to transition into the Corporate Compliance Officer role.
Develop proficiency in High-Stakes Negotiation, Corporate Strategy Planning to transition into the Corporate General Counsel role.
Develop proficiency in Carbon Emissions Auditing, Multi-Modal Freight Coordination to transition into the Green Logistics Planner role.

title: Algorithmic AI Trading Specialist
description: Designs, implements, and monitors AI-driven algorithmic trading systems. Focuses on reinforcing learning models for real-time market data adaptation.
description_zh: 设计、实现和监控基于AI的算法交易系统。专注于用于实时市场数据自适应的强化学习模型调优与流数据处理。
sources: CFA Institute: AI in Investment Management
MIT Technology Review: AI Wall Street

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Agent Swarm Orchestration, Telemetry Logging to transition into the AI Agent Fleet Manager role.
Develop proficiency in Kubernetes (K8s) Orchestration, GPU Clustering (NCCL) to transition into the AI Infrastructure Architect role.
Develop proficiency in 3D CAD Modeling, IoT Telemetry Streams Integration to transition into the Digital Twin Architect role.

title: AI Financial Compliance Auditor
description: Audits autonomous financial advice and algorithmic decision systems for regulatory alignment, bias detection, and ethical transparency.
description_zh: 审计自主理财顾问和算法决策系统，确保符合监管规定，检测并消除算法偏见，确保技术透明度与伦理安全。
sources: EU AI Act: High-Risk Financial Systems Guidelines
Financial Stability Board (FSB): Artificial Intelligence in Finance

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Patient Relation Management, Telehealth Platform Operations to transition into the AI Healthcare Care Coordinator role.
Develop proficiency in Regulatory Mapping, Compliance Software Auditing to transition into the Corporate Compliance Officer role.
Develop proficiency in Carbon Emissions Auditing, Multi-Modal Freight Coordination to transition into the Green Logistics Planner role.

title: Insurance Underwriter
description: Analyzes insurance applications to determine risk and premium. Standard risk tables and consumer datasets are increasingly auto-processed by predictive analytics engines.
description_zh: 分析保险申请，确定风险等级和保费。标准风险表和消费者数据库现已能够被预测分析引擎全自动处理。
sources: Frey & Osborne: The Future of Employment (Risk = 99%)

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.

title: Software Engineer
description: Creates, tests, and maintains software applications. Transitioning from manual coding to leveraging AI agents for code generation, focusing on architecture and security.
description_zh: 开发、测试和维护软件应用。正从手动编写代码过渡到利用AI智能体辅助代码生成，重点转向系统架构、集成与安全管控。
sources: GitHub: Octoverse Developer Survey on Copilot Adoption

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Extend into statistical modelling, experiment design, and causal inference; leverage existing Python and API skills.
Develop proficiency in Prompt Design Patterns, Vector Database Operations to transition into the Prompt Engineer & LLM Specialist role.
Build on system architecture and API design skills; add Kubernetes orchestration, GPU cluster management, and distributed storage.

title: Software Product Manager
description: Owns product vision, roadmap, and prioritization; synthesizes user research, market signals, and engineering constraints. AI copilots accelerate specs, analytics, and prototyping, but accountability for trade-offs and cross-functional alignment remains human.
description_zh: 负责产品愿景、路线图与优先级；综合用户研究、市场信号与工程约束做决策。AI 可加速需求文档、数据分析与原型，但跨团队权衡与最终责任仍依赖人类产品经理。
sources: BLS: Management Occupations — Computer and Information Systems Managers (product-adjacent)
O*NET 11-3021.00 - Computer and Information Systems Managers
McKinsey: The future of product management in the age of AI

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Prompt Design Patterns, RAG Pipeline Configuration to transition into the Prompt Engineer & LLM Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Instructional System Design (ISD), Adaptive Learning Algorithms to transition into the AI Learning Experience Designer role.
Develop proficiency in Kubernetes (K8s) Orchestration, GPU Clustering (NCCL) to transition into the AI Infrastructure Architect role.

title: Data Scientist
description: Builds statistical and machine-learning models to extract insight from data; increasingly augmented by AutoML and LLM-assisted feature engineering while human judgment remains critical for problem framing and causal interpretation.
description_zh: 构建统计与机器学习模型从数据中提取洞察；AutoML 与大模型辅助特征工程日益普及，但问题定义与因果解释仍依赖人类判断。
sources: LinkedIn Jobs on the Rise: Data Science roles

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Prompt Design Patterns, Vector Database Operations to transition into the Prompt Engineer & LLM Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Kubernetes (K8s) Orchestration, Distributed Storage Systems to transition into the AI Infrastructure Architect role.
Develop proficiency in VaR Modeling, Stress Testing Frameworks to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.

title: Technical Project Manager
description: Coordinates cross-functional engineering delivery, timelines, and risk; AI scheduling and status summarization tools reduce admin load but stakeholder negotiation and ambiguity resolution stay human-centric.
description_zh: 协调跨职能研发交付、时间表与风险；AI 排期与状态摘要工具减轻事务性负担，但利益相关方博弈与模糊情境决策仍依赖人类。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Product Roadmapping, User Research Synthesis to transition into the Software Product Manager role.
Develop proficiency in System Architecture, API Design to transition into the Software Engineer role.
Develop proficiency in Demand Forecasting, Inventory Optimization to transition into the Supply Chain Analyst role.

title: Prompt Engineer & LLM Specialist
description: Designs and refines LLM inputs to elicit desired behaviors, embedding knowledge templates and building robust context-retrieval hooks.
description_zh: 设计并精炼大语言模型输入以引导期望的输出行为，构建知识模板并整合鲁棒的上下文检索机制。
sources: World Economic Forum: Emergence of AI Prompting Roles
McKinsey: The economic potential of generative AI

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in 3D CAD Modeling, IoT Telemetry Streams Integration to transition into the Digital Twin Architect role.
Develop proficiency in Instructional System Design (ISD), Adaptive Learning Algorithms to transition into the AI Learning Experience Designer role.
Develop proficiency in Agent Swarm Orchestration, Telemetry Logging to transition into the AI Agent Fleet Manager role.

title: QA Manual Tester
description: Manually tests software UI and functionality to identify bugs. Most execution flows and regression runs are now generated and executed automatically by agents.
description_zh: 手动测试软件用户界面和功能以发现故障。大多数回归测试和执行流程现在可通过AI智能体自动生成并运行。
sources: O*NET 15-1253.00 - Software Quality Assurance Analysts and Testers
Sogeti State of AI in Quality Engineering
Gartner Magic Quadrant for Software Test Automation

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.

title: AI Infrastructure Architect
description: Designs and manages cluster configurations, high-throughput network topologies, and distributed GPU pools necessary to train and serve deep learning models.
description_zh: 设计并管理运行深度学习模型训练和推理集群所需的软硬件配置、高吞吐网络拓扑及分布式GPU算力池。
sources: IEEE: Cloud and Infrastructure Engineering trends
NVIDIA: Demand for Cluster Operations Engineers

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Surgical Robot Systems (da Vinci), Biomedical Instrumentation Calibrations to transition into the Robotic Surgery Assistant Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Drone Mission Control Software, LiDAR Diagnostics to transition into the Autonomous Fleet Coordinator role.
Develop proficiency in Robot Operating System (ROS), Cobot Teach Pendant Programming to transition into the Collaborative Robot (Cobot) Integrator role.

title: Data Labeler & Annotator
description: Categorizes, labels, and annotates text, images, and video to feed training datasets. Semi-supervised learning and synthetic data loops have marginalized manual annotating roles.
description_zh: 对文本、图像和视频进行分类和标注以供模型训练。自监督学习、合成数据生成和自动化模型评估使传统手动标注岗位大幅减少。
sources: MIT Technology Review: The decline of human labeling

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.

title: AI Agent Fleet Manager
description: Orchestrates and monitors fleets of autonomous AI agents. Diagnoses performance drift, resolves workflow edge cases, and handles system deadlocks.
description_zh: 统筹、监控和管理自主AI智能体集群的工作流。负责诊断运行偏差、处理业务边缘场景以及解决系统死锁等疑难问题。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Copyright Law & Fair Use, Model Provenance Tracking to transition into the AI Legal Forensics Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Drone Mission Control Software, LiDAR Diagnostics to transition into the Autonomous Fleet Coordinator role.
Develop proficiency in 3D CAD Modeling, IoT Telemetry Streams Integration to transition into the Digital Twin Architect role.

title: Assembly Line Operator
description: Performs repetitive assembly tasks on factory floors. Advances in computer-vision-guided robotic arms have automated high-accuracy physical processes.
description_zh: 在工厂车间执行重复性的装配任务。高精度协作机器人与计算机视觉定位技术的突破，正在淘汰标准化手动物理装配岗位。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.

title: Quality Control Inspector
description: Inspects manufactured components for defects. Transitioning from visual human check to managing automated computer vision cameras and classification models.
description_zh: 检验制造部件是否存在缺陷。岗位重点正从人工肉眼排查，转向管理、微调自动视觉相机和分类深度学习模型。
sources: O*NET 51-9061.00 - Inspectors, Testers, Sorters, Samplers, and Weighers

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Differentiated Instruction, Student Motivation Techniques to transition into the Private Academic Tutor role.
Develop proficiency in Workshop Facilitation, VR Simulation Management to transition into the Corporate Trainer role.
Develop proficiency in Demand Forecasting Models, Logistics Bottleneck Diagnostics to transition into the Supply Chain Analyst role.

title: Collaborative Robot (Cobot) Integrator
description: Integrates and programs collaborative robots on production lines, teaching trajectories, configuring vision systems, and managing physical safety barriers.
description_zh: 在生产线上部署和配置协作机器人（Cobot），负责示教机械臂运动轨迹、配置工业相机视觉引导系统并确保人机共存的安全边界。
sources: Robotics Business Review: The demand for robot technicians

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Drone Mission Control Software, LiDAR Diagnostics to transition into the Autonomous Fleet Coordinator role.
Develop proficiency in Kubernetes (K8s) Orchestration, GPU Clustering (NCCL) to transition into the AI Infrastructure Architect role.
Develop proficiency in Surgical Robot Systems (da Vinci), Biomedical Instrumentation Calibrations to transition into the Robotic Surgery Assistant Specialist role.

title: Predictive Maintenance Technician
description: Services factory machinery. Evolving from scheduled breakdown fixes to monitoring IoT vibration, acoustic, and thermal sensors analyzed by AI prediction dashboards.
description_zh: 维护工厂机械设备。正从定期或故障后抢修，转变为监控由AI算法分析的IoT振动、声学和红外温度传感器仪表盘，实施针对性预防维护。
sources: PwC: Predictive Maintenance in Manufacturing Survey

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Demand Forecasting Models, Logistics Bottleneck Diagnostics to transition into the Supply Chain Analyst role.
Develop proficiency in Workshop Facilitation, VR Simulation Management to transition into the Corporate Trainer role.
Develop proficiency in Quantitative Risk Modeling, Scenario Stress Testing to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.

title: Digital Twin Architect
description: Constructs real-time 3D simulation mirrors of physical factory floors and supply chains to optimize assembly flows and test layout changes virtually before deploy.
description_zh: 构建物理工厂和供应链的实时3D仿真数字孪生体，用于在实体部署前虚拟模拟和优化装配工序、测试布局改动。
sources: Gartner: Emerging Technologies Hype Cycle for Digital Twins

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Instructional System Design (ISD), Adaptive Learning Algorithms to transition into the AI Learning Experience Designer role.
Develop proficiency in Agent Swarm Orchestration, Telemetry Logging to transition into the AI Agent Fleet Manager role.
Develop proficiency in Robot Operating System (ROS), Cobot Teach Pendant Programming to transition into the Collaborative Robot (Cobot) Integrator role.

title: CNC Machinist
description: Sets up and operates computer numerical control (CNC) machines to cut and shape metal. CAD-to-CAM translation pipelines are increasingly fully automated by neural geometry compilers.
description_zh: 安装和操作数控机床（CNC）以切割金属。随着神经几何编译器的成熟，从CAD图纸到CAM加工代码的生成流程正逐渐被完全自动替代。
sources: BLS: Machinists and Tool and Die Makers
SME (Society of Manufacturing Engineers): CNC Automation Impact

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.

title: Radiologist
description: Examines medical images (X-rays, MRIs, CT scans) to diagnose diseases. Generative vision AI provides draft reports and locates lesions, with doctors acting as final verification.
description_zh: 检查医学影像（X光、核磁共振、CT）以诊断疾病。生成式视觉AI能够自动标注病变并起草诊断报告，医生专注于终审确认与复杂多科室联合诊断。
sources: American College of Radiology (ACR) AI Survey
Lancet Digital Health: AI vs Radiologist Accuracy studies

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Patient Communication, Differential Diagnosis to transition into the General Practitioner MD role.
Develop proficiency in Quantitative Risk Modeling, Scenario Stress Testing to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in High-Stakes Negotiation, Corporate Strategy Planning to transition into the Corporate General Counsel role.

title: AI Healthcare Care Coordinator
description: Combines remote patient monitoring data, AI symptom assessment logs, and doctor calendars to optimize chronic care pathways and follow-ups.
description_zh: 整合远程患者监测数据、AI症状初筛日志和医生排班表，设计并优化慢性病管理途径和术后随访流程。
sources: NHS: Digital Transformation and Nurse Coordinator Roles
World Health Organization: Global Strategy on Digital Health

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Carbon Emissions Auditing, Multi-Modal Freight Coordination to transition into the Green Logistics Planner role.
Develop proficiency in Regulatory Mapping, Compliance Software Auditing to transition into the Corporate Compliance Officer role.
Develop proficiency in Quantitative Risk Modeling, Scenario Stress Testing to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.

title: Medical Transcriptionist
description: Converts voice recordings of doctors into written reports. Natural language processing and whisper-like speech-to-text models have rendered manual transcribing obsolete.
description_zh: 将医生的口头录音转换为书面病历。大语言模型和高精度实时语音转文字接口的普及，使手动速录病历的岗位彻底消失。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.

title: Robotic Surgery Assistant Specialist
description: Prepares, calibrates, and assists in controlling robotic-guided surgery consoles, maintaining optical sensors and managing real-time system diagnostics.
description_zh: 准备、标定并协助主刀医生控制机器人引导的手术控制台，负责维护光学跟踪传感器并处理手术过程中的系统实时报错。
sources: Journal of Robotic Surgery training reviews

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Kubernetes (K8s) Orchestration, GPU Clustering (NCCL) to transition into the AI Infrastructure Architect role.
Develop proficiency in Robot Operating System (ROS), Cobot Teach Pendant Programming to transition into the Collaborative Robot (Cobot) Integrator role.
Develop proficiency in Drone Mission Control Software, LiDAR Diagnostics to transition into the Autonomous Fleet Coordinator role.

title: Clinical Medical Coder
description: Translates diagnoses and treatment notes into ICD codes for billing. LLMs fine-tuned on medical text can parse reports and output correct codes automatically.
description_zh: 将诊断和治疗报告翻译为标准ICD疾病分类代码以供报销。基于医学文本微调的大语言模型已能够直接解析病历并自动输出编码。
sources: O*NET 29-2072.00 - Medical Records and Health Information Technicians
AHIMA (American Health Information Management Association) survey on coding automation

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.

title: General Practitioner MD
description: Diagnoses and treats acute and chronic illnesses. Role shifts from basic diagnosis search to using AI tools for clinical decisions, focusing on patient comfort and lifestyle advice.
description_zh: 诊断和治疗各类急慢性疾病。工作重心正从传统的“查阅资料比对症状”，转向利用AI决策支持工具，把精力集中在医患沟通、复杂共病诊断和生活方式干预上。
sources: AMA (American Medical Association) Policy on Clinical Decision Support AI
New England Journal of Medicine: AI in Primary Care

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Quantitative Risk Modeling, Scenario Stress Testing to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Image Pattern Detection, Clinical Diagnosis to transition into the Radiologist Assistant / MD role.
Develop proficiency in Demand Forecasting Models, Logistics Bottleneck Diagnostics to transition into the Supply Chain Analyst role.

title: Private Academic Tutor
description: Supports students outside standard hours. Transitioning from lecturing material to tutoring study habits, managing customized learning chatbots, and solving advanced queries.
description_zh: 在课外为学生提供学科辅导。工作内容正在从“单向传授知识”，转变为指导学习习惯、配置和监管个性化AI伴学智能体，以及解答极少数高难度探究性问题。
sources: EdTech Hub Research on Personalised Learning
Gates Foundation Report on Generative AI in Classrooms

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Workshop Facilitation, VR Simulation Management to transition into the Corporate Trainer role.
Develop proficiency in Soil Chemistry, Fertiliser Planning to transition into the Agronomist & Soil Scientist role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.

title: Curriculum Developer
description: Designs textbooks, tests, and study plans. Employs generative AI to draft modular exercises, interactive virtual worlds, and personalized case studies.
description_zh: 设计教科书、测验卷和教学计划。现在的课程开发人员大量利用生成式AI快速起草模块化习题、虚拟互动情景以及个性化案例研究，并将重点放在教学法审定上。
sources: OECD Future of Education and Skills 2030

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Workshop Facilitation, VR Simulation Management to transition into the Corporate Trainer role.
Develop proficiency in Demand Forecasting Models, Logistics Bottleneck Diagnostics to transition into the Supply Chain Analyst role.
Develop proficiency in Carbon Emissions Auditing, Multi-Modal Freight Coordination to transition into the Green Logistics Planner role.

title: Grading Assistant
description: Grades assignments, essays, and tests against rubrics. Neural text classifiers and LLM graders perform automated essay scoring with high consistency.
description_zh: 根据评分细则批改作业、作文和试卷。现在的神经网络分类器和大语言模型批改系统能够快速对大量开放式文章进行评分，且结果一致性强，导致此类重复性助教岗位急剧萎缩。
sources: Stanford AI Index: Automated Grading Milestones
Frey & Osborne: Teacher Assistants Automation Risk

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.

title: AI Learning Experience Designer
description: Designs and optimizes personalized learning trajectories, tuning algorithmic tutor weights and customizing interactive voice agents for neurodiverse students.
description_zh: 设计并调优个性化AI学习路径，负责调整自适应教学算法权重、定制符合不同神经发育类型（如ADHD/自闭症）学生的互动式语音教学对话机器人。
sources: UNESCO: Guidance for Generative AI in Education and Research

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in 3D CAD Modeling, IoT Telemetry Streams Integration to transition into the Digital Twin Architect role.
Develop proficiency in Carbon Emissions Auditing, Multi-Modal Freight Coordination to transition into the Green Logistics Planner role.
Develop proficiency in Agent Swarm Orchestration, Telemetry Logging to transition into the AI Agent Fleet Manager role.

title: Corporate Trainer
description: Delivers upskilling workshops to corporate staff. Transitioning to running immersive VR simulation debriefings and building localized knowledge RAG bots for company training datasets.
description_zh: 为企业员工提供技能提升研讨会。工作方式正转变为运行沉浸式VR模拟场景的分析总结会，并为公司私有培训数据库构建和调优本地化知识RAG问答机器人。
sources: Association for Talent Development (ATD) State of the Industry Report

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Demand Forecasting Models, Logistics Bottleneck Diagnostics to transition into the Supply Chain Analyst role.
Develop proficiency in Pedagogy Design, Generative Curriculum Prompts to transition into the Curriculum Developer role.
Develop proficiency in IoT Sensor Diagnostics, Mechanical Troubleshooting to transition into the Predictive Maintenance Technician role.

title: Paralegal
description: Conducts legal research, drafts boilerplate pleadings, and reviews discovery files. Semantic vector search and LLM summary pipelines have automated these paralegal tasks.
description_zh: 进行法学研究、起草常规诉状以及核查大量证据披露文件。随着法律语义向量检索和长文本LLM摘要系统的应用，绝大多数基础助理工作均被全自动处理。
sources: Goldman Sachs Economics Research: The Potential Impact of AI on Economic Growth (Legal sector risk = 44%)

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.

title: Corporate Compliance Officer
description: Monitors business operations for regulatory alignment. Evolving to configure real-time transaction monitoring compliance software and auditing algorithmic transparency.
description_zh: 监控企业运营以确保符合法律监管。工作重点正过渡到配置和微调实时交易监测合规引擎，以及审计企业在大数据/AI决策中的算法透明度。
sources: Thomson Reuters: Cost of Compliance Report
Harvard Business Review: AI and the Compliance Function

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Quantitative Risk Modeling, Scenario Stress Testing to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Carbon Emissions Auditing, Multi-Modal Freight Coordination to transition into the Green Logistics Planner role.
Develop proficiency in Patient Relation Management, Telehealth Platform Operations to transition into the AI Healthcare Care Coordinator role.

title: Contract Review Analyst
description: Reviews legal contracts for missing clauses or liability risks. Automated contract analysis software parses agreements in seconds, flagging deviations automatically.
description_zh: 核对法律合同是否存在条款缺失或潜在法律责任风险。智能合同审核软件能在数秒内解析数百页协议，自动高亮并修改与标准范本不符的条款偏差。
sources: O*NET 23-2099.00 - Legal Support Workers, All Other
Legaltech News: The Rise of AI-Powered Contract Review

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.

title: AI Legal Forensics Specialist
title_zh: AI法律取证与数据合规专家
description: Audits large training datasets for copyright infringement, traces algorithm lineages in IP lawsuits, and provides expert testimony on AI generation forensics.
description_zh: 审计大模型训练数据是否存在侵权、追踪知识产权诉讼中的算法演化谱系，并为AI生成内容的数字取证提供法庭专家证言。
sources: WIPO: Artificial Intelligence and Intellectual Property policy

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Drone Mission Control Software, LiDAR Diagnostics to transition into the Autonomous Fleet Coordinator role.
Develop proficiency in Agent Swarm Orchestration, Telemetry Logging to transition into the AI Agent Fleet Manager role.
Develop proficiency in Surgical Robot Systems (da Vinci), Biomedical Instrumentation Calibrations to transition into the Robotic Surgery Assistant Specialist role.

title: Corporate General Counsel
description: Advises board of directors on strategic legal issues. Leverages AI for speedy research and drafting, while focusing on high-stakes negotiation and complex governance.
description_zh: 为董事会提供战略层面的法律咨询。利用AI进行超快速的事实查阅和底稿起草，主攻需要高度外交手腕的跨国谈判、危机管理与复杂的公司治理决策。
sources: Association of Corporate Counsel (ACC) annual benchmark study
Georgetown Law Center: Report on the State of the Legal Market

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Quantitative Risk Modeling, Scenario Stress Testing to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Patient Communication, Differential Diagnosis to transition into the General Practitioner MD role.
Develop proficiency in Regulatory Mapping, Compliance Software Auditing to transition into the Corporate Compliance Officer role.

title: Warehouse Order Picker
description: Picks products from warehouse shelves to fulfill orders. Replaced by Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs) and automated bin-picking arms in micro-fulfillment centers.
description_zh: 从仓库货架上拣选商品以履行订单。正大范围被自动导引叉车（AGV）、自主移动机器人（AMR）以及微型配货中心中的机械臂取代。
sources: DHL Logistics Trend Radar: Robotics and Automation

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.

title: Logistics Dispatcher
description: Schedules and dispatches trucks and shipments. Real-time fleet management software utilizes dynamic linear programming to auto-route and allocate orders.
description_zh: 编排货运车队和货运单。智能车队管理系统可基于实时路况、天气和订单量进行多变量线性规划，实现全自动的路径寻优与派单，取代人工调度员。
sources: O*NET 43-5032.00 - Dispatchers, Except Police, Fire, and Ambulance

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in HTS Tariff Classification, Import/Export Regulations to transition into the Customs Broker role.

title: Supply Chain Analyst
description: Analyzes supply chain flows to find inefficiencies. Transitioning from batch spreadsheets to configuring AI demand forecasting pipelines and global disruption simulator agents.
description_zh: 分析物流及供应链流程以发掘低效环节。工作方式正从定期处理静态电子表格，升级为维护和监控AI智能体运行的实时需求预测与全球地缘/港口断链模拟器。
sources: CSCMP (Council of Supply Chain Management Professionals) Annual Survey

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Workshop Facilitation, VR Simulation Management to transition into the Corporate Trainer role.
Develop proficiency in IoT Sensor Diagnostics, Mechanical Troubleshooting to transition into the Predictive Maintenance Technician role.
Develop proficiency in Quantitative Risk Modeling, Scenario Stress Testing to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.

title: Autonomous Fleet Coordinator
title_zh: 无人车与送货无人机群调度专家
description: Coordinates and monitors fleets of driverless delivery trucks, delivery rovers, and distribution drones, monitoring battery status and resolving navigation failures.
description_zh: 统筹并监控自动驾驶重卡、末端配送小车及配送无人机集群。负责在线监控电量、处理路网阻断或临时空域封锁等导致的配送导航中断。
sources: FAA Drone operator requirements and autonomous drone policies
McKinsey: The future of last-mile delivery

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Copyright Law & Fair Use, Model Provenance Tracking to transition into the AI Legal Forensics Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Kubernetes (K8s) Orchestration, GPU Clustering (NCCL) to transition into the AI Infrastructure Architect role.
Develop proficiency in Agent Swarm Orchestration, Telemetry Logging to transition into the AI Agent Fleet Manager role.

title: Last-Mile Delivery Driver
description: Transports packages from local depots to residential doorsteps. Driverless vans and autonomous rolling sidewalk pods are displacing high-volume courier jobs.
description_zh: 将快递包裹从本地网点运送到居民住宅门前。无人配送货车和人行道滚动配送机器人的成熟部署，使高通量传统人工配送岗位逐步收缩。
sources: BLS: Light Truck or Delivery Services Drivers

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.

title: Green Logistics Planner
description: Utilizes AI route optimizers to design net-zero delivery networks, auditing carbon footprints and coordinating multi-modal electric fleets.
description_zh: 利用AI多目标路径优化引擎设计零碳配送网络，评估各运输航线的碳足迹，并调度多式联运纯电或氢能运力车队。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Patient Relation Management, Telehealth Platform Operations to transition into the AI Healthcare Care Coordinator role.
Develop proficiency in Regulatory Mapping, Compliance Software Auditing to transition into the Corporate Compliance Officer role.
Develop proficiency in Quantitative Risk Modeling, Scenario Stress Testing to transition into the Risk Management Specialist role.

title: Retail Store Manager
description: Oversees daily store operations, staff scheduling, inventory, and customer experience. Faces structural pressure from e-commerce traffic shifts and omnichannel expectations but retains strong local community relationship value.
description_zh: 负责门店日常运营、员工排班、库存管理和顾客体验。受电商流量分流影响较大，但本地社区关系价值持续维持刚性需求。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Chemistry, Fertiliser Planning to transition into the Agronomist & Soil Scientist role.
Develop proficiency in Trade Sequencing, OSHA Safety Compliance to transition into the Construction Site Foreman role.
Develop proficiency in Trend Forecasting, Vendor Negotiation to transition into the Retail Buyer & Merchandiser role.

sources: BLS: First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers

title: Retail Buyer & Merchandiser
title_zh: 采购买手与陈列商品规划师
description: Selects product ranges and negotiates vendor contracts based on trend forecasting and margin targets. Human taste and brand intuition remain central to decisions that algorithms cannot fully replicate.
description_zh: 根据趋势预测和利润目标选择商品品类、与供应商谈判合同。人类品味判断和品牌直觉是算法目前无法完全复制的核心竞争力。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Chemistry, Fertiliser Planning to transition into the Agronomist & Soil Scientist role.
Develop proficiency in Team Leadership, Inventory Management to transition into the Retail Store Manager role.
Develop proficiency in LEED / BREEAM Standards, Energy Modelling (EnergyPlus) to transition into the Green Building Certifier (LEED/BREEAM) role.

title: Cashier
description: Processes customer transactions at point of sale. Self-checkout kiosks and frictionless store formats (e.g. Amazon Go-style) have mechanised the vast majority of repetitive payment handling tasks.
description_zh: 在销售终端处理顾客付款交易。自助结账设备和无感知结账门店（如Amazon Go模式）已将绝大多数重复性收款操作机械化。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.

title: Personal Shopper & Stylist
title_zh: 私人购物顾问与形象造型师
description: Provides curated, high-touch wardrobe consulting for premium customers. As mass market retail commoditises, demand for bespoke human styling, trust, and aesthetic judgement in the luxury segment grows.
description_zh: 为高端顾客提供精致、个性化的衣橱管理咨询服务。随着大众零售商品化，奢侈品和个性化细分市场对真人造型师的信赖感和审美判断力的需求上升。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Destination Knowledge Networks, High-Net-Worth Client Management to transition into the Experiential Travel Designer role.
Develop proficiency in P&L Management, Guest Relations to transition into the Hotel General Manager role.
Develop proficiency in Menu Engineering, Kitchen Team Leadership to transition into the Executive Chef role.

sources: BLS: Fashion Designers and Personal Stylists

title: Mixed Arable Farmer
description: Manages crop cultivation cycles, soil health, irrigation, pest control, and harvest logistics across mixed arable land. Climate variability and input cost volatility are the primary pressures, not automation.
description_zh: 管理混合耕作农场的农作物种植周期、土壤健康、灌溉、病虫害防治和收割物流。主要压力来自气候波动和农资成本变化，而非自动化。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.
Develop proficiency in Team Leadership, Inventory Management to transition into the Retail Store Manager role.
Develop proficiency in HTS Tariff Classification, Import/Export Regulations to transition into the Customs Broker role.

sources: FAO: Future of Food and Agriculture
USDA Economic Research Service: Farm Sector Labor

title: Agronomist & Soil Scientist
description: Advises farms on optimal crop varieties, nutrient management, and soil health diagnostics. Growing role in sustainable agriculture certification and regenerative farming transitions.
description_zh: 为农场提供最优农作物品种、养分管理和土壤健康诊断建议。在可持续农业认证和再生农业转型方面发挥越来越重要的作用。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Trend Forecasting, Vendor Negotiation to transition into the Retail Buyer & Merchandiser role.
Develop proficiency in Team Leadership, Inventory Management to transition into the Retail Store Manager role.

sources: OECD: Sustainable Agriculture and Food Systems

title: Regenerative Agriculture Specialist
description: Designs and implements carbon-sequestering, biodiversity-positive farming systems — cover cropping, no-till, agroforestry — to meet corporate net-zero supply chain commitments. Demand driven by ESG pressure, not AI.
description_zh: 设计并推行固碳、生物多样性正向的农业系统（如覆盖作物、免耕和农林复合系统），以满足企业净零供应链承诺。需求主要由ESG压力驱动，而非人工智能技术。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in LEED / BREEAM Standards, Energy Modelling (EnergyPlus) to transition into the Green Building Certifier (LEED/BREEAM) role.
Develop proficiency in Destination Knowledge Networks, High-Net-Worth Client Management to transition into the Experiential Travel Designer role.
Develop proficiency in Carbon Market Regulation (ETS), Climate Economics to transition into the Climate Policy & Carbon Markets Officer role.

sources: Rodale Institute: Regenerative Organic Agriculture report
World Resources Institute: Creating a Sustainable Food Future

title: Construction Site Foreman
description: Coordinates daily on-site labour, enforces safety standards, and manages sub-contractor sequencing. Physical complexity and coordination of multi-trade teams make full automation extremely difficult.
description_zh: 协调工地日常劳动力、执行安全标准并管理分包商工序。现场物理复杂性以及多专业团队协同的高度不确定性，使全面自动化极为困难。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in HTS Tariff Classification, Import/Export Regulations to transition into the Customs Broker role.
Develop proficiency in P&L Management, Guest Relations to transition into the Hotel General Manager role.
Develop proficiency in Team Leadership, Inventory Management to transition into the Retail Store Manager role.

sources: O*NET 47-1011.00 - First-Line Supervisors of Construction Trades

title: Licensed Electrician
description: Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical wiring systems in residential and commercial buildings. Strong licensing barriers and physical task complexity provide robust protection against routine displacement.
description_zh: 在住宅和商业建筑中安装、维护和修理电气线路系统。严格的执照要求与高度复杂的物理操作任务，为从业者提供了有力的替代壁垒。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Menu Engineering, Kitchen Team Leadership to transition into the Executive Chef role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.
Develop proficiency in Trade Sequencing, OSHA Safety Compliance to transition into the Construction Site Foreman role.

title: Green Building Certifier (LEED/BREEAM)
description: Audits commercial and residential construction projects for energy efficiency, water use, material sustainability, and indoor air quality to issue green building certifications (LEED, BREEAM, WELL). Driven by building decarbonisation regulation, not AI.
description_zh: 对商业和住宅建设项目的能源效率、用水、材料可持续性和室内空气质量进行审计，以颁发绿色建筑认证（LEED、BREEAM、WELL）。需求由建筑脱碳法规驱动，而非人工智能。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Carbon Sequestration Methods, Biodiversity Assessment to transition into the Regenerative Agriculture Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Trend Forecasting, Vendor Negotiation to transition into the Retail Buyer & Merchandiser role.
Develop proficiency in P&L Management, Guest Relations to transition into the Hotel General Manager role.

sources: IEA: Energy Efficiency in Buildings Tracker

title: Executive Chef
description: Designs menus, manages kitchen teams, controls food costs, and ensures consistent dish quality across service volumes. Creativity, sensory judgement, and cultural culinary knowledge are irreplaceable human attributes.
description_zh: 设计菜单、管理厨房团队、控制食材成本并在高出餐量下确保出品质量一致。创造力、感官判断力和文化烹饪知识是无法被替代的人类特质。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in NEC Code Compliance, Panel Installation to transition into the Licensed Electrician role.
Develop proficiency in Crisis Intervention, Case Management to transition into the Social Worker role.
Develop proficiency in Fashion Trend Knowledge, Client Psychology to transition into the Personal Shopper & Stylist role.

title: Hotel General Manager
description: Directs all hotel operations — rooms, F&B, events, housekeeping — to maximise guest satisfaction and profitability. Stakeholder management, crisis response, and guest relationship building are core human-dependent functions.
description_zh: 统筹酒店全部运营（客房、餐饮、活动、客房服务）以最大化宾客满意度和盈利能力。利益相关者管理、危机应对和宾客关系维护是核心人类依赖型职能。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Trade Sequencing, OSHA Safety Compliance to transition into the Construction Site Foreman role.
Develop proficiency in Fashion Trend Knowledge, Client Psychology to transition into the Personal Shopper & Stylist role.
Develop proficiency in Destination Knowledge Networks, High-Net-Worth Client Management to transition into the Experiential Travel Designer role.

sources: STR / CoStar: Global Hotel Workforce Outlook

title: Experiential Travel Designer
description: Crafts bespoke, immersive travel itineraries — cultural immersion, adventure experiences, wellness retreats — for premium travellers seeking differentiation beyond packaged tours. Demand driven by post-pandemic 'experience economy', not AI.
description_zh: 为追求差异化的高端旅行者设计定制化、沉浸式旅程（文化浸入、探险体验、疗愈静修），满足后疫情时代"体验经济"的需求，而非人工智能驱动。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Fashion Trend Knowledge, Client Psychology to transition into the Personal Shopper & Stylist role.
Develop proficiency in P&L Management, Guest Relations to transition into the Hotel General Manager role.
Develop proficiency in Carbon Sequestration Methods, Biodiversity Assessment to transition into the Regenerative Agriculture Specialist role.

sources: Skift Research: Future of Luxury Travel

title: Social Worker
description: Assesses individual and family welfare needs, coordinates support services, and advocates for vulnerable populations. Human empathy, cultural sensitivity, and ethical judgement are irreplaceable — societal demand is rising as inequality grows.
description_zh: 评估个人和家庭福利需求，协调支持服务并为弱势群体倡权。人类共情、文化敏感性和伦理判断力不可替代，随着不平等加剧，社会需求持续上升。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in IEP Development, Adaptive Teaching Strategies to transition into the Special Educational Needs Teacher (SEND) role.
Develop proficiency in CBT & DBT Therapy, Crisis Assessment to transition into the Mental Health Counsellor role.
Develop proficiency in Menu Engineering, Kitchen Team Leadership to transition into the Executive Chef role.

sources: O*NET 21-1021.00 - Child, Family, and School Social Workers

title: Public Policy Analyst
description: Researches, drafts, and evaluates government policies across health, housing, tax, and labour domains. Stakeholder negotiation, political context, and normative trade-off judgement remain deeply human.
description_zh: 研究、起草和评估健康、住房、税收和劳工等领域的政府政策。利益相关者谈判、政治背景判断和规范性权衡取舍，仍属于高度人类依赖型职能。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Source Cultivation, FOIA Requests to transition into the Investigative Journalist role.
Develop proficiency in Screenplay Analysis, Actor Direction to transition into the Film & TV Director role.
Develop proficiency in Soil Chemistry, Fertiliser Planning to transition into the Agronomist & Soil Scientist role.

sources: BLS: Political Scientists and Policy Analysts

title: Tax Inspector
description: Audits tax returns and investigates compliance failures. Routine discrepancy detection and standard audit workflows are increasingly automated by rules-engine and ML anomaly detection systems.
description_zh: 审核纳税申报表并调查合规问题。常规差异检测和标准审计工作流程已逐渐被规则引擎和机器学习异常检测系统自动化处理。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Soil Science, Crop Rotation Planning to transition into the Mixed Arable Farmer role.
Develop proficiency in Defect Taxonomy, Computer Vision Inspection Systems to transition into the Quality Control Inspector role.
Develop proficiency in MIG/TIG/Stick Welding, Blueprint Interpretation to transition into the Certified Industrial Welder role.

title: Climate Policy & Carbon Markets Officer
title_zh: 气候政策与碳市场官员
description: Develops, regulates, and enforces climate legislation, carbon pricing mechanisms (ETS, carbon taxes), and net-zero transition plans. Fastest-growing government role globally — demand driven entirely by climate emergency response.
description_zh: 制定、监管并执行气候立法、碳定价机制（碳交易体系、碳税）和净零转型规划。全球增速最快的政府岗位之一，需求完全由气候紧急应对措施驱动。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Carbon Sequestration Methods, Biodiversity Assessment to transition into the Regenerative Agriculture Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Brand Partnership Negotiation, Multi-platform Monetisation to transition into the Creator Economy Manager role.
Develop proficiency in LEED / BREEAM Standards, Energy Modelling (EnergyPlus) to transition into the Green Building Certifier (LEED/BREEAM) role.

sources: IPCC: Policy Brief on Carbon Markets
World Bank: State and Trends of Carbon Pricing 2024

title: Investigative Journalist
description: Investigates and reports on matters of public interest through source cultivation, document analysis, and field reporting. Structural decline in advertising revenue is the primary threat, not AI — deep investigation requires human source trust networks.
description_zh: 通过发展信源、分析文件和实地采访，对公众利益相关事务进行调查和报道。主要威胁是广告收入的结构性下滑，而非AI——深度调查需要人际信任网络。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Quantitative Policy Evaluation, Stakeholder Consultation to transition into the Public Policy Analyst role.
Develop proficiency in HTS Tariff Classification, Import/Export Regulations to transition into the Customs Broker role.
Develop proficiency in Trade Sequencing, OSHA Safety Compliance to transition into the Construction Site Foreman role.

sources: O*NET 27-3023.00 - News Analysts, Reporters, and Journalists
Columbia Journalism Review: State of the News Industry

title: Film & TV Director
description: Translates written screenplays into visual storytelling through creative direction of performance, cinematography, and editing. Human vision, cultural context, and collaborative leadership define this role; AI assists but does not direct.
description_zh: 通过对表演、摄影和剪辑的创意指导，将剧本转化为视觉叙事。人类愿景、文化背景和协作领导力定义了这个角色；AI可辅助但无法主导创作。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Fashion Trend Knowledge, Client Psychology to transition into the Personal Shopper & Stylist role.
Develop proficiency in Quantitative Policy Evaluation, Stakeholder Consultation to transition into the Public Policy Analyst role.
Develop proficiency in Menu Engineering, Kitchen Team Leadership to transition into the Executive Chef role.

sources: BLS: Film and Video Editors and Camera Operators
O*NET 27-2012.02 - Directors, Stage, Motion Pictures, TV, and Radio

title: Creator Economy Manager
title_zh: 内容创作者经济管理人
description: Manages the business operations, brand partnerships, and revenue diversification of independent content creators and influencers — a new professional layer between talent and platforms entirely absent before 2015.
description_zh: 管理独立内容创作者和网红的业务运营、品牌合作及收入多元化，是2015年之前完全不存在的、平台与内容创作者之间的新型专业层。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Carbon Market Regulation (ETS), Climate Economics to transition into the Climate Policy & Carbon Markets Officer role.
Develop proficiency in Carbon Sequestration Methods, Biodiversity Assessment to transition into the Regenerative Agriculture Specialist role.
Develop proficiency in Trend Forecasting, Vendor Negotiation to transition into the Retail Buyer & Merchandiser role.

sources: Influencer Marketing Hub: Creator Economy Report 2024
Goldman Sachs: The Creator Economy Report

title: Mental Health Counsellor
description: Provides individual and group therapy for depression, anxiety, trauma, and addiction. Growing demand is driven by post-pandemic mental health crisis and workforce burnout — AI chatbots are a supplement, not a substitute.
description_zh: 为抑郁、焦虑、创伤和成瘾问题提供个体和团体心理治疗。需求增长源于后疫情心理健康危机和职场倦怠——AI聊天机器人是补充工具，而非替代品。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in IEP Development, Adaptive Teaching Strategies to transition into the Special Educational Needs Teacher (SEND) role.
Develop proficiency in Crisis Intervention, Case Management to transition into the Social Worker role.
Develop proficiency in Pain Management Protocols, Grief Counselling to transition into the Palliative & Hospice Care Nurse role.

sources: BLS: Substance Abuse, Behavioral Disorder, and Mental Health Counselors

title: Palliative & Hospice Care Nurse
description: Provides compassionate end-of-life care, pain management, and emotional support to dying patients and their families. One of the most human-irreplaceable roles — demand grows with ageing demographics globally.
description_zh: 为临终患者及其家属提供富有同情心的临终关怀、疼痛管理和情感支持。是最难被取代的人类职业之一，需求随全球人口老龄化而持续增长。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in IEP Development, Adaptive Teaching Strategies to transition into the Special Educational Needs Teacher (SEND) role.
Develop proficiency in CBT & DBT Therapy, Crisis Assessment to transition into the Mental Health Counsellor role.
Develop proficiency in Crisis Intervention, Case Management to transition into the Social Worker role.

sources: NHPCO: Facts and Figures on Hospice Care

title: Special Educational Needs Teacher (SEND)
description: Supports students with physical, cognitive, emotional, or developmental disabilities through adaptive teaching methods and individual education plans (IEPs). Chronic global shortage makes this one of the fastest-growing teaching roles.
description_zh: 通过适应性教学方法和个别教育计划（IEP），为有身体、认知、情感或发育障碍的学生提供支持。全球长期短缺使这成为增速最快的教学岗位之一。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in CBT & DBT Therapy, Crisis Assessment to transition into the Mental Health Counsellor role.
Develop proficiency in Crisis Intervention, Case Management to transition into the Social Worker role.
Develop proficiency in Pain Management Protocols, Grief Counselling to transition into the Palliative & Hospice Care Nurse role.

title: Certified Industrial Welder
description: Performs structural and precision welding for heavy industry, shipbuilding, and infrastructure. While robotic welding handles repetitive flat joins, certified welders remain essential for complex geometries, repairs, and field work.
description_zh: 为重工业、造船和基础设施执行结构性和精密焊接。虽然机器人焊接可处理重复性直线焊缝，但认证焊工在复杂几何形状、维修和现场作业中仍不可或缺。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in NEC Code Compliance, Panel Installation to transition into the Licensed Electrician role.
Develop proficiency in Trade Sequencing, OSHA Safety Compliance to transition into the Construction Site Foreman role.
Develop proficiency in HTS Tariff Classification, Import/Export Regulations to transition into the Customs Broker role.

sources: BLS: Welders, Cutters, Solderers, and Brazers
American Welding Society: Welder Shortage Analysis

title: Customs Broker
description: Facilitates the import and export of goods by preparing and filing customs documentation, tariff classification, and duty calculation. Geopolitical trade policy volatility keeps specialist human knowledge in high demand despite document automation.
description_zh: 通过准备和提交报关文件、关税分类和关税计算，协助货物进出口清关。地缘政治贸易政策的频繁波动，使专业人员的知识在文件自动化背景下依然供不应求。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Develop proficiency in Trade Sequencing, OSHA Safety Compliance to transition into the Construction Site Foreman role.
Develop proficiency in Soil Chemistry, Fertiliser Planning to transition into the Agronomist & Soil Scientist role.
Develop proficiency in Source Cultivation, FOIA Requests to transition into the Investigative Journalist role.

sources: NCBFAA: Licensed Customs Broker Industry Outlook

title: Accountant
description: An accountant prepares and examines financial records, ensures accuracy and compliance with laws and regulations. AI-powered accounting software has increased efficiency but also displaces some accounting tasks. However, high-level accounting tasks requiring expertise and judgment are less likely to be automated.
description_zh: 会计师准备和审查财务记录，确保准确性和遵守法律法规。人工智能会计软件提高了效率，但也取代了一些会计任务。然而，需要专长和判断力的高级会计任务不太可能被自动化。

title: Civil Engineer
description: Civil engineers design and develop infrastructure projects such as roads, bridges, and buildings. AI is increasingly used in civil engineering for tasks like structural analysis and design optimization, but human expertise is still required for complex decision-making and on-site management. As a result, civil engineers will need to adapt to new technologies and workflows.
description_zh: 土木工程师设计和开发基础设施项目，如道路、桥梁和建筑。人工智能正在土木工程领域中被用于诸如结构分析和设计优化等任务，但人类的专业知识仍然需要用于复杂的决策和现场管理。因此，土木工程师需要适应新技术和工作流程。

title: Cloud Architect
description: Cloud architects design and build cloud computing systems for organizations, ensuring scalability, security, and efficiency. AI is increasingly used to optimize cloud resources and automate tasks, but human expertise is still required to design and manage complex systems. As a result, cloud architects must adapt to new technologies and workflows.
description_zh: 云计算架构师负责设计和构建云计算系统，确保其可扩展性、安全性和效率。人工智能正在被用于优化云资源和自动化任务，但人类的专业知识仍然需要设计和管理复杂的系统。因此，云计算架构师必须适应新技术和工作流程.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: A cybersecurity analyst is responsible for protecting computer systems and networks from cyber threats. AI and machine learning are increasingly being used to detect and prevent cyber attacks, but human analysts are still needed to interpret results and make strategic decisions. As AI becomes more prevalent, the role of the cybersecurity analyst will evolve to focus on high-level threat analysis and mitigation strategy.
description_zh: 网络安全分析师负责保护计算机系统和网络免受网络威胁。人工智能和机器学习越来越被用于检测和防止网络攻击，但仍需要人类分析师来解释结果并做出战略决策。随着人工智能的普遍采用，网络安全分析师的角色将演变为重点进行高级威胁分析和缓解策略。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Similar tech domain
Similar domain

title: DevOps Engineer
description: A DevOps engineer is responsible for ensuring the smooth operation of software systems, from development to deployment. AI is increasingly being used to automate testing, deployment, and monitoring, which may displace some tasks but also create new opportunities for DevOps engineers to focus on higher-level tasks. However, the need for human judgment and expertise in complex systems will continue to drive demand for skilled DevOps engineers.
description_zh: 开发运维工程师负责确保软件系统从开发到部署的顺畅运行。人工智能正越来越被用于自动化测试、部署和监控，这可能会取代一些任务，但也会为开发运维工程师创造新的机会，让他们集中于更高层次的任务。然而，在复杂系统中对人类判断和专长的需求将继续推动对具备技能的开发运维工程师的需求。

title: Lawyer
description: Lawyers provide legal advice and representation to clients, with AI augmenting research and documentation tasks. However, complex decision-making and human judgment remain essential skills. AI may displace some routine tasks, but not the entire profession.
description_zh: 律师为客户提供法律建议和代表，人工智能可以辅助研究和文档工作。但是，复杂决策和人类判断仍然是必备技能。人工智能可能会取代一些常规任务，但不会取代整个职业。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Similar domain
Related field
Similar domain
Similar domains
Related domain
Similar skills
Specialization shift from litigation/general to corporate advisory; same legal reasoning, narrower scope
Legal analysis + learn AI audit methods; niche but rapidly growing as AI regulation expands
Regulatory drafting and policy interpretation overlap directly with legal research skills

title: Marketing Manager
description: The marketing manager is responsible for developing and implementing marketing strategies to reach target audiences. AI is increasingly used in marketing to analyze customer data and create personalized campaigns. However, human judgment and creativity are still essential in marketing, making it a transforming role.
description_zh: 营销经理负责开发和实施营销策略以达到目标受众。人工智能在营销中越来越多地用于分析客户数据和创建个性化的活动。但是，人类的判断和创造力在营销中仍然至关重要，因此这是一个转型的角色。

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Mechanical engineers design, build, and test mechanical systems, but AI is increasingly used to optimize design and simulation, potentially augmenting their work. AI-powered tools can analyze complex systems and provide insights, reducing the need for human intervention in some tasks. However, mechanical engineers will still be needed to interpret results and make high-level decisions.
description_zh: 机械工程师负责设计、建造和测试机械系统，但是人工智能越来越多地被用于优化设计和模拟，可能会增强他们的工作。人工智能工具可以分析复杂系统并提供见解，减少对人工干预的需求。但是，机械工程师仍然需要解释结果并做出高级决策。

title: Sales Representative
description: Sales representatives work with customers to understand their needs and provide them with suitable products or services. AI-powered sales tools and chatbots are increasingly being used to automate parts of the sales process, potentially displacing some sales representatives. However, human sales representatives can still provide personalized service and build relationships with customers.
description_zh: 销售代表与客户合作，了解他们的需求，并为他们提供合适的产品或服务。 人工智能销售工具和聊天机器人越来越被用于自动销售流程的某些部分，可能会取代一些销售代表。 然而，人类销售代表仍然可以提供个性化服务，并与客户建立关系。

title: AI Engineer
description: AI engineers design and develop artificial intelligence systems, including machine learning models and natural language processing algorithms. They apply AI techniques to solve complex problems in various industries. AI engineers are in high demand due to the rapid growth of AI adoption across sectors.
description_zh: 人工智能工程师设计和开发人工智能系统，包括机器学习模型和自然语言处理算法。他们将人工智能技术应用于解决各个行业中的复杂问题。由于人工智能在各个领域的快速采用，人工智能工程师需求量很大。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Related tech skills
Similar tech domain
Some skill overlap
Similar skills
Related domain
Related domain
Similar domain
Similar tech domain

title: Data Engineer
description: A data engineer designs, builds, and maintains large-scale data systems, with AI increasingly being used to automate data processing and analysis. However, the role still requires human expertise to ensure data quality and develop AI models. Data engineers work with various tools and technologies to enable data-driven decision-making.
description_zh: 数据工程师设计、构建和维护大规模数据系统，人工智能越来越被用于自动化数据处理和分析。然而，数据工程师仍然需要人工专家来确保数据质量和开发人工智能模型。数据工程师使用各种工具和技术来实现数据驱动的决策。

title: Human Resources Manager
description: Manages the full employee lifecycle: recruitment, onboarding, performance, compensation, and compliance. AI is automating screening and analytics but human judgement remains central to culture, conflict resolution, and strategic workforce planning.
description_zh: 人力资源经理负责确定员工需求，制定招聘流程，并确保遵守就业法规，同时培养积极的工作场所文化。人工智能可以增强人力资源任务，例如招聘和员工数据管理，但复杂决策仍需要人为判断。因此，该职位正转变为承担更多战略和创造性责任。
sources: HR Manager Job Description (Updated 2026 With Examples) | ACBSP

title: UX Researcher
description: A UX researcher conducts user research, analyzes data, and communicates insights to improve product design, utilizing skills like empathy, active listening, and data analysis to drive product development.
description_zh: 用户体验研究员进行用户研究、数据分析，并传达见解以改进产品设计，利用同理心、主动倾听和数据分析等技能来驱动产品开发。

title: Retail Salesperson
description: A retail salesperson engages customers, recommends products, and drives sales while maintaining store organization and inventory. However, with the rise of e-commerce and AI-powered chatbots, some tasks such as customer service and product recommendations may be automated. Nonetheless, human salespersons will still be needed to provide personalized experiences and handle complex customer inquiries.
description_zh: 零售销售员负责接待顾客，推荐产品，并推动销售，同时保持店铺组织和库存管理。然而，随着电子商务和人工智能聊天机器人的兴起，一些任务，如客户服务和产品推荐，可能会被自动化。然而，人类销售员仍将需要提供个性化的体验和处理复杂的客户询问。
sources: Retail Salesperson | Social Sciences and Humanities | Research Starters | EBSCO Research
Retail Sales Associate Job Description Template | Monster.com

title: Fast Food Worker
description: A fast food worker's main responsibilities include taking orders, preparing food, handling transactions, and maintaining cleanliness. They must provide friendly and quick service to customers while following food safety standards and using point-of-sale systems accurately. However, with the increasing use of automation and self-service kiosks, the role is at risk of being displaced by AI and machines.
description_zh: 快餐工作人员的主要职责包括接单、准备食物、处理交易和维护清洁度。他们必须为客户提供友好和快速的服务，同时遵循食品安全标准和准确使用销售点系统。然而，随着自动化和自助服务亭的使用增加，该职位有被AI和机器取代的风险。

title: Office Clerk
description: An office clerk handles clerical tasks like filing, data entry, and answering phones, ensuring smooth office operations and effective communication. However, many of these tasks can be automated, making this role vulnerable to AI displacement. With the rise of automated phone systems and digital filing, the need for human office clerks may decrease.
description_zh: 辦公室文員負責文職任務，如檔案管理、數據錄入和接聽電話，以確保辦公室運作順暢和有效溝通。然而，許多這些任務可以被自動化，使得這個角色容易受到AI的影響。隨著自動化電話系統和電子檔案的出現，對於人工辦公室文員的需求可能會減少。

title: Home Health Aide
description: A Home Health Aide assists clients with daily personal tasks, light housekeeping, and reports on patient health, following infection control policies and maintaining client confidentiality. However, AI-powered home care systems and telehealth services may augment or replace some tasks. The role requires empathy, physical stamina, and basic medical knowledge.
description_zh: 家庭健康助理帮助客户完成日常个人任务、轻度家务，并向护士报告患者的健康状况，同时遵循感染控制政策和维护客户隐私。然而，AI驱动的家庭护理系统和远程医疗服务可能会增强或取代一些任务。这个角色需要同理心、身体耐力和基本的医学知识。

title: Janitor
description: A janitor's key responsibilities include cleaning and maintaining buildings, handling trash removal, and ensuring restrooms are stocked and sanitized. Janitors play a crucial role in maintaining a clean and safe environment. However, automation and robotics may displace some janitorial tasks, particularly those involving repetitive cleaning duties.
description_zh: 看护工的主要职责包括清洁和维护建筑物、处理垃圾、以及确保卫生间得到清洁和维护。看护工在保持清洁和安全环境方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，自动化和机器人可能会取代一些清洁工作，特别是涉及重复性清洁任务的工作。

title: Waiter
description: A waiter's key skills include communication, multitasking, and customer service, with responsibilities involving greeting guests, taking orders, and ensuring satisfaction. However, AI-powered ordering systems and automated payment processing may displace some tasks. The role still requires human interaction and emotional intelligence, making it less susceptible to full automation.

title: Administrative Assistant
description: An Administrative Assistant handles clerical tasks, schedules events, and supports management, with key skills including proficiency in Microsoft Office and strong communication. Responsibilities include managing office supplies and maintaining records. However, automation and AI-powered tools may displace some administrative tasks, putting the role at risk.
description_zh: 行政助理负责处理文职任务、安排活动和支持管理，关键技能包括Microsoft Office的熟练度和良好的沟通能力。职责包括管理办公用品和维护记录。然而，自动化和AI驱动的工具可能会取代一些行政任务，使得此职位面临风险。

title: Construction Laborer
description: Construction laborers perform physical tasks at construction sites, including cleaning, loading/unloading materials, and operating tools. They also assist with tasks like setting up scaffolding and maintaining safety. However, tasks like material handling and site cleanup are at risk of being automated.
description_zh: 建筑劳工在建设工地执行物理任务，包括清洁、装卸材料和操作工具。他们还协助设置脚手架和维护安全。然而，像材料搬运和工地清洁这样的任务有可能被自动化。

title: Elementary School Teacher
description: An elementary school teacher instructs students in core subjects, manages classroom behavior, and assesses student progress. They create lesson plans, foster a safe learning environment, and promote social and emotional development. While AI can support educational tools and resources, human interaction and empathy are crucial in this role.
description_zh: 小学教师负责教导学生基础科目，管理课堂行为，评估学生进步。他们创造教学计划，营造安全的学习环境，促进社会和情感发展。虽然AI可以支持教育工具和资源，但人类互动和同理心在这个角色中至关重要。

title: Restaurant Cook
description: A restaurant cook prepares meals, ensures ingredient freshness, and maintains kitchen cleanliness. They supervise kitchen staff and adhere to quality standards, utilizing culinary techniques and sanitation standards. However, AI-powered kitchen automation and meal preparation systems may displace some cooking tasks.
description_zh: 餐厅厨师负责准备餐点，确保食材新鲜，并保持厨房清洁。他们监督厨房员工，并遵守质量标准，使用烹饪技术和卫生标准。但是，AI驱动的厨房自动化和餐点准备系统可能会取代一些烹饪任务。

title: Accounts Receivable Manager
description: Manages the full accounts receivable cycle: credit assessment, invoicing, collections, and cash application. AI is automating invoice processing, payment matching, and collections prioritization at high speed — making manual AR clerks at risk while managers who can oversee AI-driven workflows remain relevant.
description_zh: 管理完整的应收账款周期：信用评估、开票、催款和现金核销。AI正在自动化发票处理和收款优先排序，手动AR岗位面临替代风险。

transition_targets.skill_bridge: Credit analysis and collections risk experience map directly to quantitative risk assessment; add regulatory compliance and stress testing frameworks
Deep knowledge of financial reconciliation workflows is a strong base for auditing AI-automated AR/AP systems; learn XAI and model audit frameworks
Client dispute resolution and financial reporting skills transfer; shift from institutional to personal finance with licensing
Contract enforcement and collections dispute experience is a foundation; requires law degree or paralegal certification pathway
